help_menu: Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin commands: /pause: Pause the ongoing broadcast. /resume: Resume a paused broadcast. /skip: Skip current broadcast. /stop: Stop the ongoing broadcast. /forward [seconds]: Fast forward in broadcast. /back [seconds]: Rewind in broadcast. /reload: Refresh admin cache.
help_auth: Authorized commands: Authorized users can control broadcasts without being admins. /auth: Add a user to the authorized list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized list.
help_blist: Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add to blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove from blacklist
help_lang: Language commands: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang: Change the bot's language.
help_ping: Ping commands: /help: Show help menu. /ping: Check ping and memory usage. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Show bot's sudo users list.
help_play: Playback commands: You can play music in video chat with these commands. /play [song name/youtube url/reply to audio]: Play music in video chat. /vplay [song name/youtube url/reply to video]: Play music video in video chat. -f: Force play music. -v: Play music video. Example: /play -f -v attention
help_sudo: Sudo commands: /ac: Show active calls count. /activevc: Show list of active calls. /broadcast [reply to message]: Broadcast to all chats. -nochat: Exclude groups from broadcast. -user: Include users in broadcast. -copy: Remove forward tag. Example: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Execute given code. /logs: Send log file. /logger [on|off]: Enable/disable logger. /restart: Restart the bot. /addsudo: Add a user to sudo list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from sudo list.
help_tagger: Tag commands: /atag: Tag admins. /etag: Tag everyone with random emoji. /gtag: Tag users with random nice words. /utag: Tag everyone. /invite: Invite everyone to video chat. /stop: Stop tagging.
help_fun: Fun commands: /eros: Select a couple from chat. /slap: Slap a user.
